transcript: Um... I'm already on this line?
...Okay? Uh, this is Albertsons Pharmacy. Did you need something?
[laughing] I don't know, you called us. [laughs] Um, a guy said he called, and... I just picked up the phone. He said he got another call... and he was going to take that.
So it might be some sort of a transfer, or something.
I have no idea who you're talking about, okay? So this is the Alber... if I... if I can't help you, I don't know what to say.
You're calling another... another Albertsons Pharmacy store.
Uh, ma'am, I haven't called anybody. I... I have not picked up the phone. My phone rang, and I picked up the phone.
Okay. I don't know what's goin' on either, then.
